name: rocky-marketplace
description: Marketplace serving the rocky Claude Code plugin — this repo is both the marketplace and the plugin source (source: "./").

plugins.name: rocky
plugins.description: 7 openapi_* tools (cache-first OpenAPI / Swagger spec inspection, endpoint search, tag list) + seo_validate + notion_* (ntn CLI-gated) + worklog_* (append-only local JSONL worklog, auto turn capture via Stop hook). Slash commands: /finish, /recall, /codex, /opencode, /issue, /soul.
